name: Hungary
summary: Hungary is best known for Tokaj, producing both dry and botrytised sweet wines with high acidity.

tokaj.name: Tokaj
tokaj.styleSummary: High-acid wines ranging from dry to intensely sweet botrytised styles.

Furmint.style: High acidity, citrus, green apple, mineral, can be dry or sweet.

Harslevelu.style: Aromatic, floral, softer and broader than Furmint.

tokaji-aszu.name: Tokaji Aszú (Sweet)
tokaji-aszu.styleSummary: Intensely sweet wines balanced by very high acidity.

Furmint.style: Honey, apricot, citrus peel, very high acidity, intense sweetness.
winemaking: Aszú paste added to base wine
